name: ruby-coderay
title: ruby-coderay
description:
Ruby library for syntax highlighting
CodeRay is a Ruby library that can scan an input file or text in a web
page and encode it as syntax highlighted HTML output.
.
CodeRay supports many input languages including: C, C++, CSS, Delphi, diff,
Groovy, HTML, RHTML (Erb+HTML), Nitro-XHTML, Java, JavaScript, JSON, PHP,
Python, Ruby, SQL and YAML.
.
CodeRay can output to HTML, JSON, XML, Yaml.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-coderay because Ruby library for syntax highlighting.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-coderay as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-coderay with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-coderay --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
